allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const r = z.string\(\).safeParse\(1\); if \(!r.success\) console.log\(Object.keys\(r.error\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const r = z.string\(\).safeParse\(1\); if \(!r.success\) { const e = r.error; console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(e\)\).filter\(k=>k!='constructor'\)\) }")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); const r = z.string\(\).safeParse\(1\); if \(!r.success\) { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.error.issues[0]\)\) }")
